channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: VIDEO: Burna Boy acquires custom Bugatti Chiron
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigerian superstar Burna Boy celebrates his birthday with a custom Venuum Widebody Bugatti Chiron, reportedly valued at over ₦9 billion. See details of his
Read More: https://punchng.com/video-burna-boy-acquires-custom-bugatti-chiron/

item.title: Kwankwasiyya demands probe into PFIPC budget allocation
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Kwankwasiyya Movement demands a probe into the alleged PFIPC budget allocation, urging the Presidency to clarify the N1bn controversy and uphold transp
Read More: https://punchng.com/kwankwasiyya-demands-probe-into-pfipc-budget-allocation/

item.title: Osun guber: No one will go scot-free after committing a crime — IGP Disu
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police (IGP) Tunji Disu, has warned that anyone involved in political violence in Osun State will face the full weight of the law, declaring that “nobody will commit a crime and go scot-free.” Speaking in Osogbo on Friday, the police chief said he travelled from

item.title: Oyebanji orders free medical care for freed kidnap victims
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Ekiti State Governor Biodun Oyebanji has directed free medical care and comprehensive screening for the recently freed Eda Oniyo kidnap victims.
Read More: https://punchng.com/oyebanji-orders-free-medical-care-for-freed-kidnap-victims/

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Brahim Diaz names team he wants Morocco to play in quarter-final
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Morocco playmaker, Brahim Diaz, has said he wants to face France in the quarter-final of the 2026 World Cup. Diaz provided two assists as the Atlas Lions beat co-hosts Canada 2-0 to qualify for the next round. The Real Madrid midfielder is now eager to come up against some of his club team-mates in

item.title: Northern Derby Formidable In Sustaining Culture, Tradition, Says Oluremi Tinubu
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu has commended the organization of Northern Derbys, saying it was formidable in sustaining culture and tradition. She stated this at the 44th edition of the horse racing sports where she was represented by the wife of the Vice President Hajia Nana Shettima. According to

item.title: Gunmen kill female farmer, injure another in fresh Plateau attack
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Suspected armed bandits on Saturday attacked farmers at Rinyan village in Tahoss community of Riyom Local Government Area of Plateau State, killing one woman and injuring another. The post Gunmen kill female farmer, injure another in fresh Plateau attack appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Ex-Jigawa Governor Lamido criticises Pantami over past ‘infidel party’ remark on PDP
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Jigawa State Governor Sule Lamido has criticised former Minister of Communications and Digital Economy Isa Ali Pantami over his past description of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) as an “infidel party”, while reaffirming his long-standing loyalty to the opposition party. Lamido

item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: NDC Deputy Chairman, scribe, others defect to PDP in Ebonyi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Ahead of the 2027 general elections, no fewer than 4,000 members of the Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, including the Deputy Chairman, Mr. Okechukwu Idenyi, and the Secretary, Barr. Solomon Adum, have defected to the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Ebonyi State. The defectors were formally recei

item.title: Netanyahu ‘knows who the boss is’, says Trump
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Washington is Israel's closest ally, but Trump has been publicly critical of Netanyahu in recent weeks after Israel's war with Hezbollah in Lebanon threatened peace talks with Iran. The post Netanyahu ‘knows who the boss is’, says Trump appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Archaeologists uncover ancient Byzantine city in Egypt’s western desert
item.dc:creator: The Guardian
item.description: Well-preserved fourth-century quarters reveal details of daily life, urban development and economic activitiesArchaeologists in Egypt have uncovered a well-preserved Byzantine-era city in the western desert.The fourth-century quarters had residential and religious structures, including a basilica-st

item.title: Ekiti orders free medical treatment for rescued kidnapped worshippers
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The governor urged individuals politicising the incident on social media to desist, stressing that security challenges should not be exploited for partisan interests but addressed through collective support for efforts to build a safer and more secure Ekiti.

item.title: Hezbollah, Hamas and Houthi officials attend funeral ceremonies for Iran's Khamenei
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Tens of thousands of mourners flocked to Tehran's Grand Mosalla Mosque to pay their respects to late supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Saturday. Among them were representatives from Hamas, Hezbollah and the Houthis of Yemen, members of the "axis of resistance" that Iran has long supported as

item.title: National single window hasn’t triggered demurrage, says NSC
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Nigerian Shippers' Council, NSC, has said the implementation of the National Single Window has not resulted in additional demurrage charges for shippers, despite initial concerns that the initiative could slow cargo clearance and create congestion at the nation's ports. The post National single

item.title: World Cup 2026: ‘Your ego is holding Portugal hostage’ – Zlatan Ibrahimovic slams Ronaldo
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Sweden striker, Zlatan Ibrahimovic, has hit out at Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo amid the ongoing FIFA World Cup. The former Manchester United and Paris Saint-Germain star claimed that Ronaldo’s ego is holding Roberto Martinez’s side hostage. According to Ibrahimovic, Ronaldo

item.title: Police Nab Two Kidnap Suspects, Others In Jigawa
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Police Command in Jigawa has arrested two suspects for allegedly attempting to kidnap a resident in Kiyawa Local Government Area (LGA) of the state. The command’s spokesperson, SP Lawan Shiisu, disclosed this in a statement in Dutse, on Saturday. Shiisu said the suspects, aged 25 and 27, residen

item.title: Police Arrest 89 Motorists For Number Plate Violations In Ogun
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Police Command in Ogun says it has apprehended 89 motorists for number plate violations across the state, foiled armed robbery operations, and recovered stolen motorcycles. The State Police Public Relations Officer (PPRO), DSP Oluseyi Babaseyi, disclosed this in a statement on Saturday in Abeoku

item.title: World Cup co-hosts Canada knocked out as Morocco reach last eight
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored a double before Soufiane Rahimi added a third to knock out World Cup co-hosts Canada and send Morocco into the last eight thanks to a 3-0 win in Houston.

It insisted that the senatorial district remains united in its colle

item.title: Prince Harry’s UK Visit To Go Ahead Without Meghan Markle, Prince Archie And Princess Lilibet
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Prince Harry will travel to the United Kingdom next week without his wife, Meghan Markle, and their children, Prince Archie and Princess Lilibet. The children, who had been expected to return to Britain for the first time since 2022, will no longer be part of the London leg of the trip. It remains u

item.title: NDC deputy chairman, others defect to PDP in Ebonyi
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: In a major political realignment ahead of the 2027 general elections, no fewer than 4,000 members of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), including the Deputy Chairman, Mr. Okechukwu Idenyi, and the Secretary, Bar. Solomon Adum, in Ebonyi State have defected to the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP).

Speaking during an appearance on ‘The Discourse’ podcast on June 30 while promoting ‘Enola Holmes 3’, Brown was

item.title: Sam Larry hospitalized, bouncer loses life as car rammed into trailer in Lagos
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigerian music promoter and socialite, Sam Larry, has reportedly been hospitalised after being involved in a ghastly car crash. Sam Larry’s car reportedly rammed into a trailer in the earlier hours of Saturday morning along the Lagos-Calabar Coastal Road in Lagos. The accident reportedly claim

item.title: Ozoz Sokoh Makes History As First Nigerian Cookbook Author To Win Prestigious James Beard Award
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s rich culinary heritage has earned global recognition once again, as culinary anthropologist and food writer Ozoz Sokoh has become the first Nigerian cookbook author to win a prestigious James Beard Foundation Award. Sokoh, widely known as the Nigerian Food Explorer, clinched the 2026

item.title: 'Safety first of course' | F1 chief reveals hope of restoring cancelled race to schedule
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: F1 chief Stefano Domenicali reveals hopes of restoring cancelled race to the 2026 schedule. Races in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia, both originally scheduled for April, were cancelled due to conflict in the Middle East.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Afrobeat singer and multi-instrumentalist Made Kuti is pushing back against one of the most persistent assumptions surrounding Nigeria’s most famous musical dynasty. The grandson of legendary Afrobeat pioneer Fela Kuti and son of renowned musician Femi Kuti said it is a misconception that all

item.description: ‎‎Nigerian model and actress Temi Otedola has revealed that she wouldn’t expose her child on the internet. ‎While discussing with her husband, Mr Eazi, on her podcast, she explained that posting her child isn’t part of her public brand. She said she wouldn’t integrate her child into her public life

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Formula 1 president Stefano Domenicali has confirmed the sport's bosses are hoping to be able to restore one of two cancelled races earlier this season to the 2026 calendar.

item.title: Leigh enhance play-offs bid with thumping victory over Warrington
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Leigh Leopards bolstered their hopes of making the Betfred Super League play-offs after David Armstrong led them to a dominant 24-6 victory against Warrington Wolves during Magic Weekend.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: German data in the coming week showing the cumulative impact of the Iran war will set the stage for the government’s latest bid to awaken animal spirits in Europe’s biggest economy.

item.title: Bandits abduct nine travellers on Katsina road
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Suspected bandits blocked the Bakori–Guga road in Katsina State on Friday evening and abducted at least nine travellers returning from the weekly Bakori market, according to community leaders. The post Bandits abduct nine travellers on Katsina road appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Morocco Thrash World Cup Co-host Canada To Reach Quarterfinals
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice to lead Morocco to a 3-0 win over Canada in the World Cup round of 16 Saturday to make the country the first African nation to reach the quarterfinals more than once. It’s Morocco’s second straight appearance in the quarterfinals after becoming the first African team to

item.title: Morocco beat Canada to reach consecutive World Cup quarter-finals

item.description: Morocco booked a place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating co-hosts Canada 3-0 in their Round of 16 clash at the Houston Stadium. The African champions sealed victory with two second-half goals from Azzedine Ounahi—his first-ever FIFA World Cup goals—and a stoppage-time

item.title: Has the US reckoned with its own history?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Marc Lamont Hill speaks to scholar Kimberle Crenshaw on whether the US is sliding backwards on civil rights.

item.title: 2027: Ughievwen Leaders Adopt Tinubu, Oborevwori, Dafinone, Utuama
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Ahead of the 2027 general elections, leaders and stakeholders of Ughievwen Kingdom in Ughelli South Local Government Area of Delta State have adopted President Bola Tinubu, Governor Sheriff Oborevwori and other candidates of the All Progressives Congress (APC) as their preferred candidates. Also ad

item.title: Rite Foods Drive Academic Excellence with N35m Annual National Award
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Oluchi Chibuzor  Rite Foods has launched N35m National Academic Excellence award to recognise and reward the highest-performing matriculating students across the six geopolitical zones in the country public universities, alongside

item.title: World Cup 2026: Morocco Secures Quarterfinal Spot After Comfortable 3-0 Win Against Canada
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice to lead Morocco to a 3-0 win over Canada in the World Cup round of 16 Saturday to make the country the first African nation to reach the quarterfinals more than once, usnews.com reports. It’s Morocco’s second straight appearance in the quarterfinals after becoming the fi

item.title: Osun 2026: Adeleke Reconstitutes Campaign Council To Accommodate APC Defectors
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Yinka Kolawole in Osogbo  The Governor of Osun State, Senator Ademola Adeleke, has approved the reconstituting of The Imole Campaign Council (TICC) to accommodate some prominent leaders of the All Progressives

item.title: FG Sets Three-Year Cycle for Nationwide Learning Tests, Eyes Data to Fix Education Gaps
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Kuni Tyessi in Abuja The federal government says it will institutionalise the National Learning Assessment (NLA) every three years as part of efforts to tackle learning poverty and improve the quality

item.title: JUST IN: World Cup: Morocco become first team into quarter-finals after beating Canada
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Substitute Soufiane Rahimi completed the victory deep into stoppage time, finishing off another rapid counterattack to seal a convincing 3-0 win The post JUST IN: World Cup: Morocco become first team into quarter-finals after beating Canada appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: BREAKING: Morocco thrash co-hosts Canada to become first African nation to reach multiple quarter-finals
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: Morocco secured their place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating co-hosts Canada 2-0 in their Round of 16 clash. The Atlas Lions maintained their unbeaten run in the tournament with another disciplined performance as they moved a step closer to equalling their best-ever W

item.title: Morocco knock co-hosts Canada out of World Cup, book quarterfinal ticket
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: The Atlas Lions of Morocco have clinched their ticket to the quarterfinals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after beating co-hosts Canada 3-0 on Saturday night. More to follow… The post Morocco knock co-hosts Canada out of World Cup, book quarterfinal ticket appeared first on Latest Nigeria News | T

item.title: Venezuela’s Official Death Toll From Quake Rises to Almost 3,000
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Venezuela‘s official death toll from last week’s twin earthquakes rose to almost 3,000 on Saturday.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Morocco thrash Canada 3-0 to reach quarter-finals
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Morocco produced a dominant second-half display to defeat Canada 3-0 and book their place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, ending the co-hosts' impressive tournament run in the Round of 16. The post World Cup 2026: Morocco thrash Canada 3-0 to reach quarter-finals appeared first on

item.title: NNL: Wikki Tourists Eye Top-Flight Return, Appoint Bala Mohammed
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Wikki Tourists Football Club have appointed experienced coach Bala Abubakar Mohammed as their new Technical Adviser ahead of the 2026/27 Nigeria National League (NNL) season. The Bauchi-based club announced the appointment as part of efforts to strengthen its technical crew and position the team for

item.title: Will economic pressure move the Kremlin towards talks with Kyiv?
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Relentless Ukrainian strikes on refineries have caused a fuel crisis in Russia.

item.description:

item.title: Why Did General Motors (GM) Just Partner With Micron?

item.title: Morocco rout Canada 3-0 to wake co-hosts from World Cup dream
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Canada became the first of the co-hosts to exit the World Cup as a clinical Morocco won 3-0 to reach the quarter-finals on Saturday in Houston. The post Morocco rout Canada 3-0 to wake co-hosts from World Cup dream appeared first on Vanguard News.
